name: Cake Recipe
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare the custard by cooking and stirring in a double boiler over not in hot water: remove from heat when thickened. Keep other ingredients at about 75 degrees. Sift before measuring: 2 cups cake flour, resift with 1 tsp baking soda and 1/2 tsp salt; sift 1 cup white sugar.
3. Beat until soft 1/2 cup butter.
4. Add the sugar gradually and blend until very light and creamy.
5. Beat in one at a time: 2 egg yolks.
6. Add the flour to the butter mixture in three parts, alternating with thirds of 1/4 cup water, 1/2 cup milk, and 1 tsp vanilla. Stir the batter until smooth after each addition.
7. Stir in the chocolate custard.
8. Whip 2 egg whites until stiff, but not dry. Fold them lightly into the cake batter.
9. Bake in 2 greased 9-inch round pans for about 25 minutes.
10. Spread with Caramel Icing or Chocolate Icing when cool.
Caramel Icing:
1. Stir until sugar is dissolved: 2 cups brown sugar, 1 cup cream or 1/2 cup butter plus 1/2 cup milk.
2. Cover and cook for about 3 minutes or until steam has washed down any crystals that may have formed on the sides of the pan.
3. Uncover and cook without stirring to 238-240°F.
4. Add 3 tbsp butter. Remove from heat and cool to 110 degrees.
5. Add 1 tsp vanilla. Beat until thick and creamy. If it becomes too heavy, thin with a little cream until it is of the right consistency to be spread.
